info.title: Alfresco Content Services REST API
info.description:
**Search API**

Provides access to the search features of Alfresco Content Services.

includeRequest.description: When true, include the original request in the response

RequestInclude.description:
Returns additional information about the node. The following optional fields can be requested:
 * properties
 * aspectNames
 * path
 * isLink
 * allowableOperations
 * association

RequestFields.description:
A list of field names.
You can use this parameter to restrict the fields returned within a response if, for example, you want to save on overall bandwidth.
The list applies to a returned individual entity or entries within a collection.
If the **include** parameter is used aswell then the fields specified in the **include** parameter are returned in addition to those specified in the **fields** parameter.

key.description: A key corresponding to a matching field facet label or stats.

timezone.description: A valid timezone id supported by @see java.time.ZoneId

locales.description: A list of Locales definied by IETF BCP 47.  The ordering is significant.  The first locale (leftmost) is used for sort and query localization, whereas the remaining locales are used for query only.

label.description: A label to include for reference the stats field

min.description: The minimum value of the field

max.description: The maximum value of the field

sum.description: The sum of all values of the field

countValues.description: The number which have a value for this field

missing.description: The number which do not have a value for this field

distinctValues.description: The set of all distinct values for the field (This can be very expensive to calculate)

countDistinct.description: The number of distinct values  (This can be very expensive to calculate)

cardinality.description: A statistical approximation of the number of distinct values

cardinalityAccuracy.description: Number between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating how aggressively the algorithm should try to be accurate. Used with boolean cardinality flag.

excludeFilters.description: A list of filters to exclude

percentiles.description: A list of percentile values, e.g. "1,99,99.9"

language.description: The query language in which the query is written.

userQuery.description: The exact search request typed in by the user

query.description: The query which may have been generated in some way from the userQuery

filterQuery.description: The filter query you can use to apply this facet

spellcheck.description:
Suggested corrections

If zero results were found for the original query then a single entry of type "searchInsteadFor" will be returned.
If alternatives were found that return more results than the original query they are returned as "didYouMean" options.
The highest quality suggestion is first.

ResultSetContext.description: Context that applies to the whole result set

type.description: The facet type, eg. interval, range, pivot, stats

label.description: The field name or its explicit label, if provided on the request

buckets.description: An array of buckets and values

filterQuery.description: The filter query you can use to apply this facet

display.description: An optional field for additional display information

metrics.description: An array of buckets and values

startInclusive.description: Includes values greater or equal to "start"

endInclusive.description: Includes values less than or equal to "end"

type.description: The type of metric, e.g. count

label.description: The field name or its explicit label, if provided on the request

buckets.description: An array of buckets and values

filterQuery.description: The filter query you can use to apply this facet

display.description: An optional field for additional display information

ResultSetRowEntry.description: A row in the result set

highlight.description: Highlight fragments if requested and available. A match can happen in any of the requested field.

field.description: The field where a match occured (one of the fields defined on the request)

snippets.description: Any number of snippets for the specified field highlighting the matching text

items.description: The highlighted fragment for the field.

name.description:
The name must not contain spaces or the following special characters: * " < > \ / ? : and |.
The character . must not be used at the end of the name.

textAttributes.description:
A list of query fields/properties used to expand TEXT: queries.
The default is cm:content.
You could include all content properties using d:content or list all individual content properties or types.
As more terms are included the query size, complexity, memory impact and query time will increase.

defaultFTSOperator.description:
The default way to combine query parts when AND or OR is not explicitly stated - includes ! - +
one two three
(one two three)

defaultFTSFieldOperator.description:
The default way to combine query parts in field query groups when AND or OR is not explicitly stated - includes ! - +
FIELD:(one two three)

namespace.description: The default name space to use if one is not provided

RequestTemplates.description:
Templates usewd for query expansion.
A template called "WOOF" defined as "%(cm:name cm:title)" allows
WOOF:example
to generate
cm:name:example cm:name:example

locations.description: The locations to include in the query

maxItems.description: The maximum number of items to return in the query results

skipCount.description: The number of items to skip from the start of the query set

count.description: The number of objects in the entries array.

hasMoreItems.description:
A boolean value which is **true** if there are more entities in the collection
beyond those in this response. A true value means a request with a larger value
for the **skipCount** or the **maxItems** parameter will return more entities.

totalItems.description:
An integer describing the total number of entities in the collection.
The API might not be able to determine this value,
in which case this property will not be present.

skipCount.description:
An integer describing how many entities exist in the collection before
those included in this list.

maxItems.description:
The value of the **maxItems** parameter used to generate this list,
or if there was no **maxItems** parameter the default value is 100

lastTxId.description: The id of the last indexed transaction

ResponseConsistency.description: The consistency state of the index used to execute the query

label.description: A label to include in place of the facet query

facets.description: Define specifc fields on which to facet (adds SOLR facet.field and f.<field>.facet.* options)

RequestFacetFields.description:
Simple facet fields to include
The Properties reflect the global properties related to field facts in SOLR.
They are descripbed in detail by the SOLR documentation

label.description: A label to include in place of the facet field

prefix.description: Restricts the possible constraints to only indexed values with a specified prefix.

missing.description: When true, count results that match the query but which have no facet value for the field (in addition to the Term-based constraints).

mincount.description: The minimum count required for a facet field to be included in the response.

excludeFilters.description:
Filter Queries with tags listed here will not be included in facet counts.
This is used for multi-select facetting.

permissionEvaluationTime.description: Maximum time for post query permission evaluation

permissionEvaluationCount.description: Maximum count of post query permission evaluations

RequestLimits.description: Limit the time and resources used for query execution

sets.description: Sets the intervals for all fields.

intervals.description: Specifies the fields to facet by interval.

label.description: A label to use to identify the field facet

sets.description: Sets the intervals for all fields.

label.description: A label to use to identify the set

startInclusive.description: When true, the set will include values greater or equal to "start"

endInclusive.description: When true, the set will include values less than or equal to "end"

RequestFilterQueries.description: Filter Queries. Constraints that apply to the results set but do not affect the score of each entry.

query.description:
The filter query expression.
For multi-select facets selected facets must be order together

tags.description: Tags used exclude the filters from facet evaluation for multi-select facet support

RequestSortDefinition.description: How to sort the rows? An array of sort specifications. The array order defines the ordering precedence.

type.description: How to order - using a field, when position of the document in the index, score/relevence.

ascending.description: The sort order. (The ordering of nulls is determined by the SOLR configuration)

RequestSpellcheck.description:
Request that spellcheck fragments to be added to result set rows
The properties reflect SOLR spellcheck parameters.

prefix.description: The string used to mark the start of a highlight in a fragment.

postfix.description: The string used to mark the end of a highlight in a fragment.

snippetCount.description: The maximum number of distinct highlight snippets to return for each highlight field.

fragmentSize.description: The character length of each snippet.

maxAnalyzedChars.description: The number of characters to be considered for highlighting. Matches after this count will not be shown.

mergeContiguous.description: If fragments over lap they can be  merged into one larger fragment

fields.description: The fields to highlight and field specific configuration properties for each field

field.description: The name of the field to highlight.

RequestHighlight.description:
Request that highlight fragments to be added to result set rows
The properties reflect SOLR highlighting parameters.

field.description: The name of the field to perform range

hardend.description: If true means that the last bucket will end at “end” even if it is less than “gap” wide.

label.description: A label to include as a pivot reference

excludeFilters.description: Filter queries to exclude when calculating statistics
